name: Griddle Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, bicarbonate of soda and salt together.
2. Rub the butter into the flour and add the sugar and fruit.
3. Beat the egg and add with enough milk to make a soft dough.
4. Turn out onto a floured board and roll out to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
5. Cook on a hot greased griddle.
